name: 2026-06-03 Political Commentary Flood Control 545B TH
description:
9,855 flood control projects since July 2022. P545 billion in public funds.

20% of that budget, P100 billion, went to just 15 contractors.

Ghost projects cost the economy up to P118.5 billion in two years, per the Department of Finance.

And every typhoon season, the streets still flood.

Ganun kalala.

custom_fields.value:
9,855 flood control projects since July 2022. P545 billion in public funds.

20% of that budget, P100 billion, went to just 15 contractors.

Ghost projects cost the economy up to P118.5 billion in two years, per the Department of Finance.

And every typhoon season, the streets still flood.

Ganun kalala.

9,855 flood control projects since July 2022. P545 billion in public funds.

20% of that budget, P100 billion, went to just 15 contractors.

Ghost projects cost the economy up to P118.5 billion in two years, per the Department of Finance.

And every typhoon season, the streets still flood.

Ganun kalala.

DPWH preliminary report (via PCO, 2025) and Philstar (Aug 11, 2025): 9,855 flood control projects worth P545B funded since July 2022; 20% of budget (~P100B) went to 15 contractors. Department of Finance (Sec. Ralph Recto, Sep 2025, via Inquirer / GMA / Rappler / BusinessWorld / SCMP): ghost flood control projects cost the PH economy up to P118.5B from 2023-2025. Senate Blue Ribbon partial report (chair Lacson) approved Feb 10, 2026; ICI submitted 125-day accomplishment report Feb 6, 2026; DOJ readying corruption charges for initial 14 projects. Live arc through May-June 2026.
